name: OpenClaw Workflow Planner
description: Planning-first OpenClaw workflow plugin with bundled role skills, a file-backed WORKFLOW_PLAN.md state surface, and typed actions for idea creation, research attachment, idea gate, plan lifecycle, task tracking, snapshots, and implementation handoff.

plannerFilePath.description: Optional path to the markdown planner state file. Defaults to WORKFLOW_PLAN.md in the current working directory.
